data.title: Bitcoin tests key support as bulls reset to prepare for futures-led rally to $101.5K
data.description:
Bitcoin traders’ risk sentiment turned bullish, with the proof being in this week’s futures-led advance to $95,000. Will bulls make another attempt after retesting a key underlying support level?
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-tests-key-support-as-bulls-reset-to-prepare-for-futures-led-rally-to-dollar101-5k?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitcoin Transfer from Cumberland DRW to Bullish.com Observed
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 06:10, 50 BTC were transferred from Cumberland DRW to Bullish.com. Following this, Cumberland DRW moved the remaining 19.99988732 BTC to another address starting with bc1q8s3h3.

data.title: U.S. workers get smallest share of GDP since 1947 as Fed’s Barkin points to persistent low hiring
data.description:
U. S. workers are taking home the smallest slice of GDP since records began in 1947, according to new federal data. Numbers from the Bureau of Labor Statistics show that the share of economic output paid to workers through wages and salaries dropped sharply in the third quarter of last year. The figure landed at 53. 8%, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/u-s-workers-smallest-share-of-gdp-since-1947/
